metadata.title:
7 KILLED
NEAR G. n.


TUNNEL

Another Fatal Accident at


Scene of Great Snow
slide.

pages.raw_text:
SEATTLE, Wash, Sept. 1.-TWO
men were killed near the yelling
ton tunnel on the Great Northern
railroad today when fifteen heavily
laden freight cars broke away from
the hauling locomotive and dashed
down the steep incline toward See
mic Hot Springs, where scores lost
their lives In the snow slides last
winter.


william Richardson. 65 years old.
track walker, saw the cars com
ingDand In attempting to get out
of their way, he stumbled and fell
to the bottom of the incline hun
dreds of feet below. Nearly every
bone In his body was broken and he
died in few minutes. The cars
crashed into cabin near the tracks
and killed William Johnson, the oc-
cupant Of the building.
